reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1 (Dead Code): Function is actively used (registered in RPC topic mapping). Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Entry point is P2P RPC (UNTRUSTED), not a trusted source. Gate 3 (Scope): PeerDAS data column validation is Fusaka-specific and in scope. An attacker can trigger this via P2P RPC by_root request by providing a data column with valid KZG/inclusion proofs but invalid proposer signature, causing the node to serve unvalidated sidecars to peers, violating the invariant that served sidecars must pass full gossip validation. Medium severity justified by potential impact on Prysm clients (31% of consensus layer).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7594: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling; Consensus spec requirement that sidecars must pass gossip validation before serving
